objects.name: Mini Shai-Hulud Pushes Malicious AntV npm Packages via Compromised Maintainer Account
objects.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a fresh software supply chain attack campaign that has compromised various npm packages associated with the @antv ecosystem as part of the ongoing Mini Shai-Hulud attack wave. "The attack affects packages tied to the npm maintainer account atool, including echarts-for-react, a widely used React wrapper for Apache ECharts with roughly 1.1 million weekly

external_references.description: Mini Shai-Hulud Pushes Malicious AntV npm Packages via Compromised Maintainer Account
